title: The Sun Riders
description: Super Quasar, Aurora Six, and Johnny Sunspot are the Sun Riders and use their sun powers to take down super villains.
parent: Super Robot Monkey Team Hyperforce Go!
altHero: The Sun Riders in their orange and white costumes atop a clif
alt1: Aurora Six shooting a laser gun
alt3: Johnny Sunspot shooting a black hole out of his hands
alt4: their team-up robot hitting a monster with a huge hammer
